description:
Northbridge Consulting is restructuring for Q2. Henry Kim (VP Operations) is departing, and Rachel Torres has been hired as his replacement. As Executive Assistant, execute the full calendar transition in Odoo (http://localhost:8069, login admin/admin).

Create a new contact for Rachel Torres with Job Title 'VP Operations', email rachel.torres@northbridge.org, phone +1-555-0275, company 'Northbridge Consulting'.

Modify the entire 'Operations Daily Sync' recurring weekday series: replace Henry Kim with Rachel Torres in the attendees and change the location to 'Virtual (Zoom)'.

Reschedule the 'Quarterly Business Review' to exactly one week later than its current date (same day-of-week and time). Remove Henry Kim from the attendees, add Rachel Torres, and update the description to: 'Q2 restructuring agenda: new reporting lines, updated departmental KPIs, and budget reallocation proposals.'

Additionally, create a recurring 'Operations Transition Check-in' meeting every Monday and Thursday for the next 4 weeks starting from next Monday, 9:00-9:30 AM, in 'Operations Hub'. Attendees: Rachel Torres and Grace Patel. Description: 'Bi-weekly transition check-in to track handover of operational responsibilities.' Add a 30-minute email reminder.
